meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to rapidly validate and build SaaS ideas. A professional checklist for founders to overcome analysis paralysis.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Use Claude Code to rapidly prototype high-demand micro-SaaS tools by analyzing market gaps and shipping functional MVPs in hours, not weeks. By automating the boilerplate and leveraging Antigravity for architectural scaffolding, you transform abstract concepts into revenue-generating assets with unprecedented speed and precision.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of founders. You have the ambition and the technical capability, yet you find yourself trapped in a cycle of endless ideation, paralyzed by the fear that your next project won't find product-market fit. The friction between a spark of inspiration and a functional, deployed application is where most SaaS dreams go to die.

But the era of manual boilerplate is over. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you gain the ability to iterate at the speed of thought. This isn't just about writing code; it's about building a systematic pipeline that validates your market assumptions through rapid prototyping, allowing you to pivot, iterate, and monetize before the competition even finishes their initial wireframes.

steps.title: Market Gap Identification
steps.description: Use AI to analyze current subreddit or Twitter trends to find underserved niches, ensuring your project solves a real, painful problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the top 50 recent posts in r/SaaS and identify three recurring technical pain points. Propose a micro-SaaS solution for each that requires minimal UI but high utility.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research --query 'current underserved niches in productivity SaaS'

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate a robust project structure that follows enterprise-grade standards, ensuring your MVP is scalable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-performance Next.js 14 architecture with Tailwind, Supabase, and Stripe integration. Include a modular folder structure for rapid feature addition.

steps.title: Core Logic Implementation
steps.description: Focus on the 'Unique Value Proposition' feature. Use Claude Code to write the backend business logic that actually solves the user's problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust function to process user input, perform sentiment analysis, and return a structured JSON report. Ensure error handling for API latency.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement the core analysis service logic in /services/analysis.ts'

steps.title: Rapid UI Integration
steps.description: Convert functional logic into a clean, conversion-focused interface that minimizes user friction and maximizes sign-ups.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a high-conversion landing page component using Shadcn UI. Include a clear value prop, pricing table, and a primary CTA button.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ui 'create a landing page with a hero section and a feature grid using shadcn components'

steps.title: Automated Validation Loop
steps.description: Set up automated tests to ensure your core logic holds up under load, preventing technical debt from stalling your launch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for the primary API endpoints. Ensure 90% coverage for the core business logic functions.

pro_tips: Always use Claude Code in 'agentic' mode for bug fixing to maintain context across the entire codebase.
Inject your own 'house style' prompts into Antigravity to ensure consistent code quality across all your micro-SaaS projects.
Prioritize building the payment flow before the core feature to validate 'willingness to pay' early.
Use Claude Code to summarize your codebase into documentation automatically every time you push to main.
Leverage Antigravity to simulate 'edge case' user behavior to break your app before you launch to production.
content.next_steps: Once you have your MVP, deploy to Vercel, run your first marketing experiment on social media, and use the feedback loop to iterate your next feature set using Claude Code.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical framework to eliminate the 'no project' problem forever. Stop stalling and start shipping. The market is waiting for your solution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
